# Carotene light absorption

## Short Teaching Summary
Carotene light absorption: β-carotene absorbs in the short-wavelength blue region and reflects the longer yellow, red, and orange wavelengths. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
